folio.label: 54r
folio.l: Sic desunt fabula Coci, & Incipit ¸logus legis ¹iti ;

note.notetxt: 1The ink is darker than the one used in 53 v. A new folded folio begins here in the quire and the folio has a smaller number of line in the page. ODR

folio.l: Oure host saw wel / æ the brigút sonne
The ark of his artificiale day , hatú ronne
The ferthe part , and half an oure & more
And thougút he were not , depe I stert in lore
He wist it was , the eigút and twenty day
Of ApriÂ , that is messanger vn to May
And saw wel , æ the shadewe of euäy tree
Was as in lengthe , the same quantite
That was the body erecte , that causet it
And æäfore by the shadewe , he tok his wyt´
That phebus , whicú æ shone , so clere and brigút
Sixe degrees was fyue & fourty clombe on heigút
And for that day , as in that latitude
It was ten of the clok , he gan conclude
And sodeynly he pligút , his hors a boute
Lordynggis q¶ he , I warne ©ow alle this route
The ferthe ¹tie of this day , is gon
Now for the loue of god , & of Seynt Ioún
Lesetú no tyme , as ferfortú as ©e may
Lordynggã the tyme wastetú , nygút & day
And steletú from vs , what preuyly slepynge
And what æorugú negligence , in oure wakynge
As doth the strem , that tånetú neuäe a geyn
Descendyngö fro the mounteyn , in to a pleyn
Wel can Senek , and many a Philosophre
By waylen tyme , more than gold in coffre
For losse of catel , may recouered be
But losse of tyme , shendetú vs q¶ he
It wyl not comen a geyn , w outen drede
Nomore than wyl , Malkyns maydenhede
Whan she hatú lost it , in hire wantounesse
Lat vs nougút mowlen thus , in Idelnesse
Sire man of lawe q¶ he , so haue ©e blisse
Telle vs a tale a non , as forward isse
ñe ben submytted , thurgú ©oure free assent
To stonden in this cas , at my Iugement´
Acquiteth ©ow now , of ©oure byhest
Than han ©e don , ©oure deuer at the lest
Host q¶ he , de¹dieux iche assent
To breke forward , is not myn entent
Byhest is dette , and I wol holde fayne
Al my behest , I can no betre sayne
